text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
38 
PHRMCY_SRVC_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Pharmacy Service Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: The type of pharmacy used. This variable indicates the type of pharmacy that dispensed the 
prescription, as recorded on the PDE. 
CMS requires Part D plans to maintain pharmacy networks that are sufficient to ensure access to 
Medicare beneficiaries – including retail, home infusion,
